message:
test(fcp-conformance): typed recovery artifact bundle and strengthened offline repair assertions

mvp_vertical_slice.rs: Major expansion of offline_repair_reduced_
availability_then_recovery with typed evidence structs
(ScenarioAssertionEvidence, RecoveryReplayEvidence,
RecoveryCoverageEvidence, RecoveryArtifactBundle).

New helpers: coverage_bps() for basis-point integer coverage,
count_available_replicas() querying mesh gossip layer,
build_recovery_artifact_bundle() constructing structured
JSON-serializable evidence.

Test now tracks precise replica counts before/after repair (not just
running node counts), asserts coverage in basis points (6666 bps
degraded, 10000 bps recovered), verifies repaired node actually
recovered the object, validates log JSONL, builds and round-trips
artifact bundle through serde_json, and asserts every field.

OFFLINE_REPAIR_SCENARIO constant replaces string literals.

fcps_durability_boundary.rs: Migrate manual ObjectTransmissionInfo
struct literal to ObjectTransmissionInfo::from_oti(OTI::new(...)) to
align with refactored OTI constructor API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
